◎简　　介  

　　When Julie's husband dies, she moves cross-country to rebuild her life with son Matty and build a closer relationship with her late husband's sister, Alison. Yet Alison blames Julie for her brother's death and has a plan to become Matty's mother - no matter who gets hurt in the process.
introduction: When Julie's husband dies, she moves cross-country to rebuild her life with son Matty and build a closer relationship with her late husband's sister, Alison. Yet Alison blames Julie for her brother's death and has a plan to become Matty's mother - no matter who gets hurt in the process.
